title: Rumors of Sky Island
description: On pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part focuses on the salvage monkeys appear. Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Salvage Monkeys Appear sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nami, Narrator, Luffy, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Fufu... Sure, I'll keep that in mind.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ohh, 9 Love you so much, sister!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Defting love, OMy jet black body.:)

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Qs deifwood caught in your stream...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Looks like we're the last bastions.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ms. Navigator, is the log pose alright?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Straight West- Northwest! Everything's A-OK, sister! 🙁

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sanji! When are the snacks coming!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Fall, eh? Fall's fine by me too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think this is rain...

summary: Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
